rationale: Round-1's AC5 completeness finding is fully addressed. The plan explicitly classifies panel_decision_test.go:211-219, cmd/mindspec/panel_test.go:557-558, and panelstate_test.go:903-905 as outcome-preserving fixture repairs in Bead 1 step 6(f-h). Step 7 and the verification checklist require diff review across all eight preserving updates, explicitly including those three, and require the complete touched-fixture file list in completion notes. The durability rework is also executable and provenance-complete: AC11 maps the failed-write/not-closed fence, panel-removed TOCTOU retry, post-write erasure-survival test, and fail-closed MergeMetadata unit; AC12 maps deterministic slot/round dedup and duplicate-slot behavior. internal/bead/bdcli.go and bdcli_test.go are included in Bead 2's frontmatter and verification scope, while the decomposition and ADR/domain notes explicitly attribute the edit to the execution domain and explain the approved-spec scope refinement. No remaining blocking or completeness gap found.

findings.summary: All three previously omitted RC-filler fixtures are now explicitly classified and included in the Bead-1 diff-review and completion-note inventory.
